CustomField.description: this will be used for the S.FLOW_5112 to be able to show user info about the account on the lookup list.
CustomField.formula: "Deal? " & IF(fxSAPHasDeal__c,"YES","No") & " / Txn#: " & TEXT(fxSAPTransactionCount__c) & " - " & Target_Account__r.Name & " ("& PKI_SAP_Sales_Org__c &") " & " / Address: " & Target_Account__r.PKI_SAP_Street__c & "," & Target_Account__r.SMAX_PS_PKI_SAP_Address_Concatenated__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: info about the account on the lookup list inside teh select payer flow
CustomField.label: fxAccountInfo
